All work committed. Here's the summary. ``` [RALPH] ✅ MISSION COMPLETE ``` ## Summary Implemented the "Add Welcome Landing Page with Under Construction Notice" plan in full. **Files created (committed as `f23a349`):** - `index.html` — semantic HTML5 page: `

Welcome to Hula

`, an `under-construction` section (🚧 icon, "Under Construction" heading, explanatory message), `lang="en"`, viewport meta, title `Hula — Coming Soon`, and the intent comment above the section. - `styles.css` — CSS reset, centered flex layout, amber under-construction banner, responsive relative units. - `.github/workflows/pages.yml` — GitHub Pages deploy workflow using `actions/deploy-pages@v4`. **Verification (all passed):** - AC2 `

Welcome to Hula

` ✓ - AC3 under-construction notice with 🚧, heading, message ✓ - AC4 title `Hula — Coming Soon` ✓ - AC5 responsive at 375px — satisfied by design (`max-width:480px` + `width:100%` + `box-sizing:border-box` + body padding, no fixed widths) ✓ - AC6 no `
